chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 1072 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.08.2023. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Farhad Ali Abro Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Nouman Sahito Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri A.A.G. ----- We have been appraised about the facts of the case by learned A.A.G. It appears that previously a writ petition No.D-7252 of 2018, was filed with almost same prayer i.e. to include 10 years of services rendered as daily wager, while the service of the petitioner to be regularized. Such prayer was declined by this Court, however, for the scrutiny purposes it was sent to the Department. The Department also declined such service to be included and hence the petitioner has yet again filed this petition to consider the petitioner for the post of Computer Operator keeping in view 10 years services of the petitioner, some of which on daily wages basis. Such indulgence cannot be extended when the order of the scrutiny has not been challenged as the regularization requires eligibility to be seen otherwise which is adjudged by Scrutiny Committee, not under challenge. The petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE A.
